name: nkia-codex-skills
description: Codex skills for NKIA feature/task workflows, multi-repo auto-dev, PR/MR validation, and weekly reporting.

interface.shortDescription: NKIA Linear, multi-repo dev, code review, and weekly report skills
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for NKIA-AI feature/task planning, task start, multi-repo auto-dev and auto-submit orchestration, standalone commit generation, standalone PR/MR code review, PR/MR shipping with Korean validation, post-merge wrap-up, evidence validation, parent feature roll-up, and weekly work reporting.
defaultPrompt: Use $feature to define a parent Linear feature.
Use $task to create child implementation tasks.
Use $auto-submit to submit multi-repo auto-dev work.
Use $code-review to validate a GitHub PR or GitLab MR.
Use $finish after PR/MR merge to clean branches, register evidence, validate AC, and roll up Linear status.
Use $weekly to prepare the weekly report.
